audit_items.proof_trace: lookupUTF8Unsafe is a pure table-lookup function that contains zero memory allocation or deallocation calls; a grep for free/delete/malloc/new across the entire file returns no matches. The function only reads from caller-provided const pointers (table, s8) and an integer index reference, so the UAF precondition (free(p)) is never satisfied, making the property vacuously hold.
